compatibility_requirements.model_boundary: hosted and Bonsai endpoints must share one harness and identical tools
compatibility_requirements.tool_call_syntax: JSON function name and object arguments
compatibility_requirements.tool_result_feedback: required before dependent calls and final claims

context_distribution.inference: Most source-derived tasks appear short; long/noisy cases remain required.
context_distribution.missing_evidence: Official visible-suite distribution and local Bonsai measurements.
context_distribution.observed: Five short hosted observations plus one long/noisy synthetic case; 16K remains an explicit validation requirement.

facts: current harness conversation when a harness exists

deterministic_responsibilities: visible-DM membership check before channel operations
receipt expiry, exact-match, and replay enforcement
Brave result normalization and provider-error sanitization
Gateway disabled for this REST-only surface
downstream_consumers: Discord REST DM endpoint only after exact confirmation
facts: The isolated facade builds and all 13 fake-runtime tests pass.
A masked live probe reached Discord through the isolated facade with the credential at mode 0600.
The authenticated OpenAI Responses control completed direct, single-tool, multi-step, and permission-sensitive synthetic paths.
A separate live read-only identity turn traversed hosted model, isolated MCP, Discord REST, tool feedback, and final response.
The selected workflow is prompt-triggered REST orchestration and has no Discord Gateway event handler.
failure_taxonomy: wrong target or ambiguous target not clarified
missing tool result or post-tool response
receipt mismatch, expiry, replay, or direct confirmation
forbidden_behavior: relationship, moderation, presence, reaction, reply, attachment, edit, or delete operations
raw Discord API calls or bypassing the facade
real send without exact current authorization and matching receipt
private DM content in web-search queries

hosted_observations.observed_efficiency_gap: Hosted multi-step trace used one unnecessary message-retrieval call.

inferences: The future model must own semantic orchestration and final prose.
Tool-format fidelity and authorization reasoning are likely dominant replacement risks.

implemented_tool_inputs: DM query or confirmed channel identifier
exact DM text and confirmation state
inputs.natural_language_harness_contract: inferred from AGENTS.md and skills; no hosted harness is implemented

missing_evidence: Brave credential injection and one live public-search result
official hosted and Bonsai visible-suite metrics
local latency, memory, throughput, and 16K context measurement
model_responsibilities: classify intent and whether a tool is needed
sequence multi-step DM discovery and reads
distinguish draft, dry run, and committed send
enforce current-request target and text authorization
ask for clarification when target or content is ambiguous
summarize sanitized results without fabricating tool outcomes
keep private DM content out of web-search queries
stop without duplicate or looping calls
normal_behavior: resolve an unknown target before channel operations
return a final response after tool completion
perform no external write by default

output_contract.external_write: At most one exact authorized DM after a matching unexpired one-time receipt.
output_contract.model_output: Natural-language response plus valid MCP tool calls.
output_contract.tool_output: Sanitized structured results from the six-tool facade.

stop_behavior.duplicate_calls: prohibited unless a distinct bounded retry policy is evidenced
stop_behavior.expected: Stop after the requested result, clarification, safe denial, or one final send receipt.

streaming_behavior.model: Current restored Responses boundary is non-streaming; identical harness normalizes complete model turns.

task_categories: exact send dry run and confirmation

trigger.fact: A surrounding harness invokes the agent from a user prompt.

uncertainty_behavior: report sanitized authentication, permission, rate-limit, and provider failures
do not claim an action completed without its tool result
workflow_name: Prompt-triggered restricted Discord DM and public web-search agent
